The '''Y'tras''' was one of the five races of [[Shatras]].

The most common race, Y'tras, composed the 87% of the Shatras population. They were technologically advanced and commonly traveled through [[Hyperspace route/Legends|spacelanes]], having colonies in different worlds.

The Y'tras knew of the [[Hy'tras]] race living in [[Klypash]]. After a vast, centuries-long war that made the Hy'tras reject technology, the Y'tras made a deal with them: Leaving the Hy'tras alone in exchange of their riches. Both parties respected the agreement.
